headlines: Memory makers are slaves to the boom-bust rollercoaster, and the AI boom is the wildest ride of all
It's an AI web, and we're just rats in the walls
AI customers are coming around to the idea that small is beautiful
Irish datacenters now guzzle 23% of the country's electricity
crew_quote: "Blimey, the weather’s as confused as a curry-loving cat at a vegan buffet! And that AI boom? More twists than my last haircut!"
